channel.title: AWS Portfolio Workshop
channel.description: Recent content on AWS Portfolio Workshop

item.title: AWS IAM - The First Foundation When Learning Amazon Web Services
item.description: An introduction to AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) and why it should be the first AWS service you learn.

item.title: AWS First Cloud AI Journey Community Day 2026
item.description: Attended AWS First Cloud AI Journey Community Day 2026 in Ho Chi Minh City.

item.title: Overview
item.description:
Overview

This workshop provides a step-by-step guide to deploying the Enterprise HelpDesk system on Amazon Web Services (AWS), covering the complete deployment process from building the network infrastructure to deploying the application, monitoring the environment, and optimizing AWS resources.

item.title: Week 1
item.description: AWS Vietnam, work processes, AWS Account and practice environment

item.title: AWS CloudTrail Lake - Analyzing AWS Activity with SQL to Enhance System Security
item.description: Learn about AWS CloudTrail Lake, how to query event data using SQL, and its role in monitoring, auditing, and investigating security events on AWS.

item.title: Mini Meetup – First Cloud AI Journey 06/06/2026
item.description: Attended a meetup covering Docker, AWS WAF, Neptune, WebSocket, and Cloud careers.

item.title: Prerequisites
item.description:
Prerequisites

Before starting this workshop, ensure that you have completed the following prerequisites to ensure a smooth deployment experience.

1. AWS Account

You must have an active AWS account with sufficient permissions to create, modify, and delete the AWS resources used throughout this workshop.

item.title: Week 2
item.description: AWS Console, Lab Guide, architecture diagrams and core AWS services

item.title: AWS Deadline Cloud - A Cloud-Based Rendering Solution for Optimizing Digital Content Production
item.description: Learn about AWS Deadline Cloud, a fully managed cloud rendering service on AWS for film production, game development, architecture, and 3D graphics.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: Architecture

item.title: Week 3
item.description: GreenLens Kids requirements analysis and AWS storage services

item.title: Deployment
item.description: Deploying the Enterprise HelpDesk System on AWS

item.title: Week 4
item.description: Detailed architecture design for the GreenLens Kids system

item.title: Week 5
item.description: Advanced IAM, Amazon S3, AWS CLI and CloudWatch

item.title: Week 6
item.description: AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway integration

item.title: Week 7
item.description: Amazon DynamoDB design and implementation

item.title: Week 8
item.description: Amazon Cognito authentication and authorization

item.title: Clean Up Resources
item.description: Clean Up Resources

item.title: Week 9
item.description: Log analysis, CloudWatch alerts and system operations

item.title: Demo
item.description: Verify the functionality of the Enterprise HelpDesk system after deployment on AWS.

item.title: Week 10
item.description: End-to-end testing, performance, security and AWS cost optimization

item.title: Week 11
item.description: Feature completion, demo video and technical documentation

item.title: Week 12
item.description: Internship summary, report completion and presentation preparation
